source: MDC Google Drive document / Pulse survey tab, condensed to four learner-facing questions

surveys.title: Pre-pulse
surveys.description: Two quick questions before the feedback scenario.

questions.text: I feel comfortable taking part in a feedback conversation.
I know how to turn feedback into clear and actionable next steps.

surveys.title: Post-pulse
surveys.description: Two quick questions after practising CARE or REAL.

questions.text: I feel more confident taking part in a feedback conversation after this practice.
I can apply CARE or REAL to make my next feedback conversation more effective.
